title: cyrtopera andamanensis
intro: Cyrtopera andamanensis, also known as the Andaman orchid, is a species of orchid native to the Andaman Islands in India. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to inhibit the growth of bacteria and fungi. The health benefits of Cyrtopera andamanensis include its potential to treat skin infections, wounds, and inflammation, due to its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into herbal remedies such as infusions, extracts, and poultices to harness its medicinal properties.
